docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, EDWIN
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JAN-05-2006, GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, EDWIN
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, EDWIN HEARING SET FOR JAN-05-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEGEMENT OF RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM THE SHERIFF'S DEPT TOGETHER WITH OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION & COPY OF HEARING DATE.
THE JUDGEMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART.
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 OF ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGEMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGEMENT.
A COPY OF THE RULING SENT TO BOTH PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF'S DEPT.
CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR DEFT SUBMITTED IN COURT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,247.42 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, EDWIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, EDWIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,095.56 FILED BY LEE, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, EDWIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, EDWIN $2,095.56 PRINCIPAL, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,196.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OTHER ORDERS: JUDGEMENT DEBTOR TO PAY JUDGEMENT CREDITOR $70.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING 1/30/06 AND ON THE 30TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER.
